name: Architecture Decision Record

metadata.description: Captures important architectural and technical decisions made during system design, including the context, options considered, rationale, and consequences of the decision.

sections.title: Decision Summary
sections.purpose: Provide a concise description of the architectural decision being recorded.

sections.title: Context
sections.purpose: Explain the background, constraints, and problem that led to the need for this decision.

sections.title: Decision
sections.purpose: Clearly state the architectural or technical decision that has been made.

sections.title: Options Considered
sections.purpose: Describe the alternative approaches that were evaluated before reaching the final decision.

sections.title: Decision Rationale
sections.purpose: Explain why the selected option was chosen over other alternatives.

sections.title: Trade-offs
sections.purpose: Document the trade-offs, compromises, and limitations associated with the chosen decision.

sections.title: Impact Analysis
sections.purpose: Describe how this decision affects architecture, development, operations, security, and maintainability.

sections.title: Risks
sections.purpose: Document risks introduced by this decision and potential mitigation strategies.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.purpose: Capture assumptions made while making the decision.

sections.title: Follow-up Actions
sections.purpose: Describe actions required to implement or validate this decision.

sections.title: References
sections.purpose: Provide links to related architecture documents, diagrams, or external resources.

sections.title: Decision Status History
sections.purpose: Track the lifecycle of the decision such as proposed, accepted, deprecated, or superseded.

validationRules: Each ADR must capture a single architectural decision.
The decision must include at least one alternative option that was considered.
The rationale must clearly justify the selected option.
Impacts on architecture or system behavior must be described.

promptHints.systemIntent: Generate a structured architecture decision record capturing a single architectural decision and its reasoning.
rules: Focus on one architectural decision at a time.
Clearly describe the problem context and constraints.
Explain the reasoning behind the selected decision.
mustDo: Use exact section titles from the template.
Clearly distinguish between options considered and the final decision.
mustNotDo: Do not record multiple unrelated decisions in a single ADR.
Do not omit the rationale behind the decision.
Do not invent technical constraints not present in the context.
